List Calls Used in Function

Source: R/funCalls.R
funCalls.Rd

For screening purposes it can be useful to get a list of all function calls our function may depend on. funCalls() parses the function source and return all found function calls grouped by their package.

Usage

funCalls(name, package = NULL, sort = FALSE)

Arguments

name

the name of the function

package

the name of the package

sort

logical (default FALSE) should the arguments be alphabetically sorted?

Note

Based on code by Nicholas Cooper.

References

Becker, R. A., Chambers, J. M. and Wilks, A. R. (1988) The New S Language. Wadsworth & Brooks/Cole.

See also

ls, ls.str, lsf.str

Other pkg.introspection: extractArgs(), funArgs(), funKeywords(), funList(), getDotsArg(), mergeArgs(), quot(), rdLabels(), rdTitle(), strX()

Examples


funCalls("combN", package="bedrock")
#> named list()
